title: The Enchanted Forest
intro: Luna wakes up beneath a glowing tree. Navigate the forest maze, collect magical treasures, then face the memory challenge.

forestMaze.title: Forest Maze — Collect Treasures
forestMaze.hint: Use Arrow Keys (↑ ↓ ← →) or the W A S D keys on your keyboard to move Luna one step at a time. Collect the Silver Key, Lantern, and Moon Crystal.

npc.greeting: You found what the forest hid. How shall we proceed, Luna?

choices.label: Trust the Owl
choices.response: Owl: "Wise choice. Match related memories — not identical ones. You have five lives. Use your power-ups wisely."

choices.label: Question the Owl
choices.response: Owl: "Fair enough. Moon pairs with Night, Key with Lock, Flower with Garden. Five lives — choose carefully."

choices.label: Ignore the Owl
choices.response: Owl: "I will guide you anyway. Related pairs only — five lives before the path closes."

pairs.dialogue: Luna: "The moon feels familiar... it belongs to the night sky. Is that why my name is Luna?"
Owl: "This silver key opens the lock on the path to your next memory."
Luna: "I remember holding this flower in a secret garden when I was little."
Owl: "You are finally awake, Luna. I will guide you through the forest."
Luna: "This lantern brings light to the darkest paths."
Owl: "The forest protects forgotten dreams beneath these mushrooms."

storyScene.title: Memory Restored
storyScene.text:
The glowing tree trembles. Luna sees flashes of her childhood in the forest. The Owl bows slowly.

Owl: "One memory fragment returns. The silver gate awaits beyond the roots."

ending: The glowing tree opens a hidden path. A silver gate appears between two ancient roots. Luna uses the silver key and walks through the gate toward the Moonlight Lake.

title: The Moonlight Lake
intro: Beyond the gate lies a lake of memories. Navigate the boat, solve the lake maze, and recover Luna's final memories.

boat.title: Boat Navigation — Collect Crystal Stars
boat.hint: 6 crystal stars are scattered on the lake. Collect any 3, then sail to the center goal. Rocks block your boat!

lakeMaze.title: Lake Maze — Collect Moon Keys
lakeMaze.hint: Use Arrow Keys (↑ ↓ ← →) or W A S D keys to move one step at a time. Collect all 3 Moon Keys.

npc.greeting: Swan: "You crossed the lake and found the keys. The memory board awaits — match related pairs and remember the story."
npc.fireflyHint: Firefly: "You have five lives and three of each power-up. Pair related concepts — Boat with Lake, Star with Hope!"

choices.label: Trust the Swan
choices.response: Swan: "Your memories were never lost — only hidden safely beneath the water."

choices.label: Question the Swan
choices.response: Swan: "Doubt is natural. Pair related concepts: Boat with Lake, Star with Hope, Pearl with Necklace."

choices.label: Ignore the Swan
choices.response: Swan: "The lake remembers even when you do not. Proceed — use your power-ups wisely."

pairs.dialogue: Luna: "This pearl... it was from a necklace I wore long ago."
Owl: "You once crossed this lake in a boat to protect the forest."
Luna: "The stars were guiding me that night — they meant hope."
Swan: "Your memories were never lost. They were hidden safely."
Owl: "This crystal contains the truth of Luna's sacrifice."
Luna: "The water lily brings calm and healing to troubled hearts."
Luna: "The moon reflects on the lake just as my memories reflect my past."
Luna: "The silver key still opens the gate in my mind."

storyScene.title: The Truth Emerges
storyScene.text:
The lake glows as Luna recalls crossing the water to seal away darkness. She gave her memories to save the magical forest.

Swan: "One final trial awaits — the Memory Guardian will test what you have learned."

ending: The lake begins to glow. The crystal rises from the water. Luna touches it and remembers everything — she protected the forest by giving up her memories, and now they return as the darkness fades.
finalMessage: Luna smiles as moonlight fills the sky. Her memories are back, and the forest is peaceful again.
